message:
refactor(widgets): complete EvidenceDescription enum migration in scorer

Completes the migration of format!() string evidence descriptions to
the EvidenceDescription enum for consistent allocation-free scoring.

Changes:
- Convert match_type.description() to EvidenceDescription::Static()
- Convert position format string to EvidenceDescription::FirstMatchPos
- Convert word boundary count to EvidenceDescription::WordBoundaryCount
- Convert gap total to EvidenceDescription::GapTotal
- Convert coverage percentage to EvidenceDescription::CoveragePercent

All evidence descriptions in the scoring path now use the typed enum,
eliminating all String allocations during the hot path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
